product_overview: Zewijuna is a culturally-focused Muslim dating mobile app providing a swipe-based discovery experience, profile management, real-time messaging and membership upgrades via Arifpay. The app emphasizes privacy, security, and a streamlined path toward serious relationships.
core_goals: Provide a secure, privacy-first matchmaking experience aligned with Islamic cultural expectations.
Enable fast, responsive discovery using a swipe interface with persistent like/match state.
Support real-time messaging between matched users with reliable delivery and sync.
Offer subscription upgrades via Arifpay and immediately reflect membership state.
Ensure smooth onboarding and profile setup to reduce time-to-first-match.

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: Welcome walkthrough that introduces the app and guides new users into signup.
user_flows: /onboarding -> See welcome screens -> Click through walkthrough cards -> Click Get Started -> Navigate to /signup
/onboarding -> See welcome screens -> Click Get Started -> Network error prevents navigation -> See error message and prompt to retry

features.name: User Authentication (Login & Signup)
features.description: Email/password based authentication using Supabase Auth for sign-up and sign-in.
user_flows: /signup -> Fill email address -> Fill password -> Click "Sign Up" button -> Receive successful signup confirmation -> Navigate to /profile-setup
/signup -> Fill email address -> Leave password blank -> Click "Sign Up" button -> See validation error message and remain on /signup
/login -> Fill email address -> Fill password -> Click "Sign In" button -> Receive successful authentication -> Navigate to /
/login -> Fill email address -> Fill wrong password -> Click "Sign In" button -> See authentication error message

features.name: Profile Setup
features.description: Initial profile creation where users add photos, bio, preferences and other essential details before discovery.
user_flows: /profile-setup -> Fill display name -> Add photos -> Fill bio/description -> Select preferences -> Click Save -> Navigate to /
/profile-setup -> Attempt to upload photo larger than allowed -> See upload error -> Correct photo and retry
/profile-setup -> Leave required field blank -> Click Save -> See validation error and remain on /profile-setup

features.name: Discovery / Swiping
features.description: Swipe-based browsing of candidate profiles with backend calls to fetch profiles and record likes.
user_flows: / -> View profile card -> Swipe right to Like -> POST /likes -> See next profile card
/ -> View profile card -> Swipe left to Pass -> See next profile card
/ -> View profile card -> Swipe right to Like -> POST /likes fails with network error -> See error toast and profile restored for retry
/ -> View profile card -> Swipe right to Like -> App prevents action due to daily swipe limit -> See limit notification and prompt to upgrade

features.name: Messaging (Real-time Chats)
features.description: List and open matched conversations, send and receive messages in real time with persisted history.
user_flows: /messages -> Open conversation with match -> Type message -> Send message -> See message appear in conversation and confirmed delivered
/messages -> Open conversation with match -> Type message -> Send message -> Network error prevents delivery -> See unsent indicator and option to retry
/messages -> View list of conversations -> Select conversation -> See message history load

features.name: Profile (View & Settings)
features.description: User's profile and account settings area for editing personal details and app preferences.
user_flows: /profile -> View profile and settings -> Click Edit -> Update bio -> Click Save -> See updated profile
/profile -> Click Edit -> Change email -> Click Save -> See validation/verification required message and follow-up steps
/profile -> View settings -> Toggle preference -> See preference saved

features.name: Premium Membership & Payments
features.description: Upgrade flow for purchasing membership tiers via Arifpay and updating user membership state on success.
user_flows: /premium -> Select a premium plan -> Click "Upgrade Now" -> Complete payment flow via Arifpay -> Receive payment success -> Membership status updated
/premium -> Select a premium plan -> Click "Upgrade Now" -> Payment fails or is declined -> See payment failure message and option to retry or choose another plan
/premium -> Select a premium plan -> Click "Upgrade Now" -> Network interruption during payment -> See timeout/error and guided recovery options

routes.description: List of users who Liked the current user
User's own profile and settings overview

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and Signup with email/password via Supabase

features.name: Discovery / Swiping
features.description: Browse through profiles and swipe right to like or left to skip

features.name: Premium Membership
features.description: Upgrade membership and handle payments via Arifpay
